creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 174910
poudriere-test-12-amd64


I am working on 'devel/py-http-prompt' upgrade that uses 'www/httpie' and it's broken right now.

www/httpie needs this upgrade:
  pkg_resources.DistributionNotFound: The 'requests>=2.11.0' distribution 
  was not found and is required by httpie

I've did a QA:

portlint: OK (looks fine.)
testport: 
	poudriere: i386,  10.3  (OK)
	poudriere: amd64, 10.3  (OK)
	poudriere: i386,  9.3   (OK)
	poudriere: amd64, 9.3   (OK)
	poudriere: i386,  12    (OK)
	poudriere: amd64, 12    (OK)
	
Attached poudriere logs as example.
